name: pmll-memory-mcp
summary: PMLL Memory MCP Server v2 — persistent memory logic loop with short-term KV cache (peek pattern), Q-promise deduplication, Context+ long-term semantic memory graph, and solution engine. Four-way benchmarked: Combined Context+ + PMLL/peek delivers 36ms (TS) / 78ms (PY) total — fastest configuration. 15 tools, agent_instructions workflow included. 99% accuracy in Claude Sonnet/Opus agent tasks.
author: drQedwards
